content: We can refactor LLM-based AI-agent frameworks to replace generic iterative reflection loops with a 2025-configurable ICM curiosity mechanism, which treats the agent’s own emerging reasoning trajectories as the 'unknown environment' it explores for intrinsic reward instead of only optimizing for external task objectives. This allows LLM agents to spontaneously discover unstated, creative problem-solving paths that aligned reward models would never prompt them to explore.
